project_overview.name: Classroom Record System
project_overview.purpose: A centralized platform for recording, monitoring, reporting, and managing attendance for classrooms, groups, offices, events, and training programs.
problem_statement: Manual attendance tracking is time-consuming and error-prone.
Paper registers and spreadsheets can lead to incomplete records, delayed updates, inaccurate reports, and data loss.
A centralized system improves tracking, reporting, monitoring, and decision-making.
objectives: Manage users based on assigned roles.
Assign users to classrooms or groups.
Record attendance by date, classroom, group, or user.
Support Present, Absent, Late, and Excused attendance statuses.
Allow correction of inaccurate attendance records.
Export reports in Excel and PDF.
Use QR codes for faster attendance marking.
Print attendance sheets for offline tracking.
